zh.lifeSummary: Llewelyn ap Hywel是Hywel Felvn ap Gruffudd的兒子，於1150年出生。他至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Llewelyn ap Hywel是Hywel Felvn ap Gruffudd的儿子，于1150年出生。他至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
meanings: A Welsh name. Some write the name Hoel, which they render 'lordly;' if so, it may come from huail, a vice-regent, regent. Arthur derives the surname Howell from Corn. -Brit, houl, the sun; and he adds, high, exalted.' But Hywel is rather from hywel, conspicuous.

nameMeanings.name: Llewelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llywellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

en.lifeSummary: Llewelyn ap Hywel was born in 1150 as the son of Hywel Felvn ap Gruffudd. He had at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Llewelyn ap Hywel est né en 1150, fils de Hywel Felvn ap Gruffudd. Il a eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Llewelyn ap Hywel wurde 1150, als Sohn von Hywel Felvn ap Gruffudd geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Llewelyn ap Hywel è nato il nel 1150 come figlio di Hywel Felvn ap Gruffudd. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Llewelyn ap Hywelは1150年にHywel Felvn ap Gruffuddの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Llewelyn ap Hywel(은)는 1150년 Hywel Felvn ap Gruffudd의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Llewelyn ap Hywel nasceu em 1150 filho de Hywel Felvn ap Gruffudd. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Llewelyn ap Hywel родился в 1150 г. Его отца звали Hywel Felvn ap Gruffudd. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Llewelyn ap Hywel nació en 1150 como hijo de Hywel Felvn ap Gruffudd. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija.
